EmailTemplate.description: Template for push alert of Pro Space contact assignment after creation
EmailTemplate.name: Lead - Pro Space Contact Assignment
EmailTemplate.subject: There is a new ProSpace Contact in your Region !
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear user,
A Pro Space contact {!Contact.LastName} {!Contact.FirstName} has been created in your region.
You have 30 days for validating this contact.
Regards,
System Administrator
